phrases.en: Later today, I'm going to do my laundry.
phrases.zh: 今天晚些时候，我要洗衣服。

phrases.en: I'll carry the laundry basket to the laundry room.
phrases.zh: 我会把洗衣篮搬到洗衣房。

phrases.en: I'll take the laundry out of the basket.
phrases.zh: 我会把衣服从篮子里拿出来。

phrases.en: And then I'll sort it by separating dark colors from light.
phrases.zh: 然后我会把深色和浅色分开来整理。

phrases.en: I'll check the pockets of the pants and shirts.
phrases.zh: 我会检查裤子和衬衫的口袋。

phrases.en: And take out anything I find in them.
phrases.zh: 把里面找到的东西都拿出来。

phrases.en: Then, I'll put a load of laundry into the washing machine.
phrases.zh: 然后，我会把一批衣服放进洗衣机。

phrases.en: I'll adjust the settings on the machine.
phrases.zh: 我会调整洗衣机的设置。

phrases.en: Then, I'll put in some detergent.
phrases.zh: 然后，我会放一些洗衣液。

phrases.en: And turn the machine on.
phrases.zh: 再把洗衣机打开。

phrases.en: The machine will wash, rinse, and spin the laundry.
phrases.zh: 洗衣机会洗涤、漂洗，然后甩干衣服。

phrases.en: I'll take the wet clothes out of the machine.
phrases.zh: 我会把湿衣服从洗衣机里拿出来。

phrases.en: I'll hang some of the laundry out to dry.
phrases.zh: 我会把一些衣服挂出去晾干。

phrases.en: I'll put some other laundry into the dryer.
phrases.zh: 我会把另一些衣服放进烘干机。

phrases.en: The dryer will dry it by heating and tumbling it.
phrases.zh: 烘干机会通过加热和翻滚把衣服烘干。

phrases.en: Then, I'll take it out of the machine.
phrases.zh: 然后，我会把它从机器里拿出来。

phrases.en: I'll fold some of the dry laundry.
phrases.zh: 我会把一些干衣服叠好。

phrases.en: And put it into drawers.
phrases.zh: 再放进抽屉里。

phrases.en: I'll iron other things.
phrases.zh: 我会熨其他衣物。

phrases.en: And hang them up in the closet.
phrases.zh: 再把它们挂进衣柜里。
